title: Fiskars SmartFit Loppers Bypass L86, Non-stick coating blade, Cutting diameter: 5 cm, Hardened steel, Handle length: 66-90 cm, Black/Orange, 1013564
features: Telescopic loppers for Fresh Wood, For pruning twigs or tree branches, shrubs and hedges up to 5 cm in diameter, For right-and left-handed
Firm grip thanks to non-slip coating on handles, Easy adjustment of shaft length, Long reach thanks to telescopic handle

Clean and powerful cut: Non-stick coating on the blade for a smooth and clean cut, The lower cutting blade is curved for better holding of the branch being cut, Cutting diameter (5 cm) among the most important on the market
Long life product, Stainless steel, Easy sharpening of the cutting blade, Diamond file sold separately in the maintenance kit (available under the reference number: 1001640), Finnish design
Contents: 1x Fiskars SmartFit Lopper Bypass L86, Length: 66-90 cm, Weight: 1.3 kg, Material: Precision steel/Non-stick coating, Colour: Black/Orange, 1013564
description: From the manufacturer For young branches and twigs Smartfit, Telescopic Bypass-Tree Pruner The SmartFit telescopic bypass-tree pruner is perfect for cutting fresh and young shoots, branches and twigs. The non-slip handles are highly secure and comfortable. The handles have an adjustable length - between 66 and 90 cm - which makes it easy to reach branches that are higher up. Previous page Telescopic tree pruner Telescopic tools have a larger reach; this light and robust lever made of aluminium and glass fibre-enforced plastic also makes your work easier. Bypass - For fresh wood The blade and counter blade cut into the wood and produce a clean cut without damaging the branch. Bypass shears are perfect for cutting fresh greenery. Anvil - For dry wood The blade goes through the wood with pressure: the anvil blade supports the branch and distributes the pressure until the end of the cutting process. Ideal for cutting dry and hard woods. Adjustable length The length of this telescopic tree pruner can be adjusted between 66 and 91 cm for comfortable and efficient working during various circumstances. Quality since 1649 Fiskars stands for quality and innovation since 1649. Our scissors have cut millions of meters of fabrics. Our axes have chopped millions of trunks. Fiskars stands for 100% happiness. Next page Previous page Various cutter heads Bypass head Perfect for cutting fresh wood. Various cutter heads Anvil head With a non-slip point on the underside for higher stability. Various cutter heads Scissor head Very good for precise cutting of wood Various cutter heads Hook-shaped head Especially good for heavy cutting of fresh wood.
